main_text:
Game 3 Final Score: Warriors 110, Cavaliers 102 | Warriors lead series 3-0 | Series Hub
The Lede: Despite an off night from Stephen Curry and Klay Thompson, the Warriors earned a pivotal Game 3 win in Cleveland behind Kevin Durant’s 43 points, 13 rebounds and seven assists.
